description: Composition Navy blue jeans made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with two insert pockets, two patch pockets on the back with embroidery detailing, comfortable waistband with belt loops, brand patch on the waistband at the back and metal button and zipped closure on the front. Fit Slim narrow fit Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water at 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry normal Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This fabulous pair of denims from denizen adds an edgy style to your look, while the soft cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. This pair stretches well to accommodate your body movements. Team it with a T-shirt and sneakers for a weekend coffee date or with a crisp white shirt and a structured blazer for a dressed up look. Model statistics Product is a size 32 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
